QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_99

question.text: Life insurance companies empanelled by PFRDA to provide annuities are called:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Life insurance companies empanelled by PFRDA to provide annuities are called Annuity Service Providers (ASPs). Examples include LIC and HDFC Life. **The Trap:** ASPs are different from PFMs. PFMs manage investments during accumulation, while ASPs provide annuities during distribution/retirement. **Cross-Exam Context:** ASPs include LIC, HDFC Life, and other empanelled life insurers. The subscriber must choose an ASP at the time of exit. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Help clients compare annuity rates across different ASPs before retirement. The difference in rates can significantly impact monthly pension.
